string.text: [Master] He wants to kill us, Vasily. [Vasily] Kill us? How can he kill us, he's pathetic. [Master] He can't kill us. We're tired of talking to him. [Vasily] Yes, tired of it. Get out of here, stalker, while your protection lasts, and don't come back. [TOGETHER] GET OUT OF HERE!
You must be destroyed - you are MONSTERS!!!

[Master] Yes, we feed. If you haven't noticed, we don't have full life-support equipment here, we need to eat somehow. [Vasily] Stupid stalkers, stupid scientists, stupid soldiers. They come to the city. Our city. We control them and bring them here, they die here and we feed on them. [Master] We feed deliciously.
Is that why there are so many corpses here? You feed on them?

(you feel careful attempts to probe a weak spot in your mind) [Master] What a good protection. Where did it come from? Tell him, Vasily. [Vasily] We were brought here in a tube. They were going to dispose of us. But we are not lab animals to be disposed of. We disposed of them ourselves. [Master] We disposed of them excellently. The water here is now very nourishing. [Vasily] Very nourishing, Master, excellent water. They decompose, we feed on them.
Calm down, I'm not going to obey you. Where did you come from?

[First] He wants to know what we are, Vasily. [Second] What a curious stalker. Is he a scientist? I was a scientist too. Let's explain to him, Master. [First] Okay, okay, let's explain. [TOGETHER] WE'LL EXPLAIN. [First] This scum in a spacesuit you see in front of you is Vasily. He also wanted to know what we are, before. He found out. We EXPLAINED it to him. [Vasily] And what you see right behind me, in the ventilation shaft and here - that's Master. Master requires OBEDIENCE. [TOGETHER] OBEY! (the pressure on your mind sharply increases and then weakens again).
What the hell is going on here? What are you even?

(the pressure on your mind sharply increases but then weakens significantly) [First] We can't penetrate his mind, Vasily. [Second] He's aggressive, Master. He's well protected. [First] He's a scientist and came to study us? [Second] Maybe we can kill him? [First] No, we can't kill him, his mind is inaccessible, the protection interferes. [Second] Then we'll have to talk to him, Master. [First] Yes, talk, we can talk, it will give us time to come up with something. [TOGETHER] WE'LL TALK TO YOU, STALKER.
Hey, get out of my head, freaks!

(you feel something trying to penetrate your mind, unsuccessfully) [First] We can't feel him, Vasily. [Second] He's protected from us, Master. [TOGETHER] Why can't we feel you, stalker, what are you protected with?
Umm... I... Came to find the source of the radiation.

(you hear two voices in your head) [First] Strange guest we have today, isn't it, Vasily? [Second] Yes, strange guest. How did he get here? [First] Indeed, how did he get here? [TOGETHER] HOW DID YOU GET HERE, STALKER?
